news.headline: Nokia launches FastMile Gateway 4, a 5G gateway with Wi-Fi 7 support for in-home high-speed connectivity.
news.summary: Nokia Corporation (NYSE:NOK) recently unveiled the FastMile Gateway 4, a compact 5G indoor gateway paired with Wi-Fi 7. This new product is aimed at delivering seamless high-speed connectivity across households. Key features of the gateway include high-gain antennas reaching up to 8 dBi and dual-band Wi-Fi 7, providing consumers with a self-installable solution. Supporting 4-carrier aggregation and up to 300MHz bandwidth, the gateway optimizes radio capacity, extends coverage, and increases throughput. The 5G Gateway 4 also incorporates 8RX and 3TX capabilities for enhanced spectrum efficiency and quicker speeds. Furthermore, Wi-Fi 7's multi-link operation (MLO) boosts performance by enabling devices to transmit simultaneously.

Canadian PPI MoM Actual 0.4% (Forecast 0.3%, Previous 1.6%)
US Continued Jobless Claims Actual 1.892M (Forecast 1.8865M, Previous 1.870M)

Canadian PPI YoY Actual 4.9% (Forecast -, Previous 5.8%)
Element Fleet Management Corp. plans to offer senior unsecured notes in a private offering to raise capital for working capital and debts.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Element Fleet Management Corp. (TSX: EFN) announced plans to sell senior unsecured notes in a private offering. The company, known as the world's largest publicly traded automotive fleet manager, aims to raise funds for working capital and general corporate expenses, including potential debt repayment. The Notes Offering will not be registered under the Securities Act of 1933. This move is subject to market factors and other conditions.

news.headline: Witan PLC Alliance reports Net Asset Value standing at 500 million pounds.
news.summary: A recent study revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 6.2% just a year ago. The study also indicated that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month alone, bringing the total number of employed individuals to over 60 million. Furthermore, the study highlighted that the construction and technology sectors experienced the most growth in employment opportunities. Experts believe that these positive trends in the job market are attributed to the government's recent economic policies and investments.

news.headline: BIO-key International to host Q4 investor call on March 27th at 10am ET - focus on identity, access management, and biometric solutions.
news.summary: Leading provider of identity, access management, and biometric solutions, BIO-key International (Nasdaq: BKYI), will be hosting its Q4 investor call on Thursday, March 27th at 10am Eastern Time.

news.headline: Excimer laser in Japan study shows superior results over non-UVB sources for skin conditions. Laser tech benefits: 400 Hz frequency, deep penetration, more melanocyte activation, high pigmentation, fewer side effects.
news.summary: A study published in Japan by researchers from Nippon Medical School compared the effectiveness of Excimer Laser technology to Excimer Light in treating dermatologic conditions like Vitiligo, Psoriasis, Alopecia Areata, and Atopic Dermatitis. Despite both devices emitting the same 308-nm wavelength, the study found that the Excimer Laser's unique properties, including monochromatic coherent light, a high frequency of 400 Hz, and high irradiance, led to deeper penetration into hair follicles and greater activation of melanocyte lineage cells. This resulted in superior clinical outcomes with better pigmentation and fewer side effects. The study highlights the importance of the modality generating UVB light in influencing the effectiveness of treatment devices.

news.headline: PDD stock drops as Temu parent misses revenue forecast, growth rate slows from triple-digit to below.
news.summary: The stock of PDD Holdings experienced a decline when its parent company, Temu, reported a decrease in growth rate compared to the triple-digit levels seen at the beginning of the previous year. This decline in growth caused Temu to miss its revenue forecast. The news of PDD stock falling due to Temu's performance was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Accenture's fiscal Q2 earnings and revenue beat estimates, raising revenue outlook; concerns over government business.
news.summary: In its fiscal second quarter, Accenture announced earnings and revenue that slightly surpassed expectations. The company also raised the lower end of its revenue forecast for the fiscal year. This update comes amid concerns regarding Accenture's government business.

news.headline: Arista CEO discusses Ethernet's role in AI networking battle against Nvidia, impacting stock outlook for the company.
news.summary: Arista's stock performance hinges on its competition with Nvidia as major cloud companies construct data centers for artificial intelligence. According to Arista CEO Ullal, Ethernet technology is poised to succeed in the AI networking arena. This information was featured in an article from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Elon Musk's association with DOGE has turned Tesla into a political symbol since Trump took office.
news.summary: Since January, Elon Musk has been leading DOGE during President Donald Trump's tenure. An analyst has expressed concerns that Musk and DOGE have transformed Tesla into a political symbol, characterizing it as unfavorable.

news.headline: Pedro Sánchez, Ralph Gonsalves, and other global leaders convene in NYC for Global Citizen NOW to combat extreme poverty.
news.summary: The Global Citizen NOW summit, dedicated to ending extreme poverty, is coming back to New York City for its fourth consecutive year on Wednesday, April 30. Influential figures from various sectors such as government, policy, advocacy, private sector, media, entertainment, and philanthropy will gather to discuss actionable plans to eradicate extreme poverty. Notable co-chairs for this year's summit are Pedro Sánchez, the President of the Government of Spain, and Ralph Gonsalves, the Prime Minister of Saint Vincent and the Grenadines.

news.headline: Ubiik released Maverick 220, the first high-power LTE-M/NB-IoT module for private LTE and utility applications.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Ubiik unveiled Maverick 220, an innovative LTE-M/NB-IoT module tailored for utilities, private LTE networks, and industrial IoT applications. The module represents a significant advancement in connectivity solutions, offering enhanced capabilities for these sectors. Ubiik, renowned for its expertise in private LTE and IoT connectivity, is at the forefront of this tech development. The Maverick 220 is poised to revolutionize how these industries operate by providing them with cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Lupus Research Alliance awards 11 researchers for engineered cell therapies for lupus; new Targeted Research Program (TRP-ECT) introduced.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, the Lupus Research Alliance revealed the first winners of the Targeted Research Program on Engineered Cell Therapies for Lupus (TRP-ECT). This program aims to advance the safe and accessible development of treatments for lupus. It signifies a crucial step towards understanding the mechanisms involved in combating the disease.

news.headline: Hallmark introduces AI-driven campaign in Charlestown, promoting internal-first staffing to cut contract labor.
news.summary: In Charlestown, Massachusetts, Hallmark has launched a new campaign utilizing artificial intelligence to advocate for prioritizing internal staffing. The campaign aims to decrease contract labor usage and enhance the efficiency of the hospital workforce.

news.headline: Investors face a $4.5T triple-witching event, challenging their strategies.
Expert warns recession likely by July. Fed projects median unemployment rate at 4.4% by 2025, signaling economic downturn.
news.summary: The Federal Reserve Board and Federal Open Market Committee released economic projections during a recent FOMC meeting. The median expectation for the unemployment rate in 2025 was 4.4%, with projections ranging from 4.1-4.6% and a central tendency of 4.3-4.4%. David Rosenberg, founder of Rosenberg Research & Associates Inc, warned of a potential recession, citing historical data that a 100 basis point increase in the unemployment rate from its cycle low has always been followed by a recession. The current cycle low was 3.4% as of April 2023, indicating a potential economic downturn. Rosenberg suggested that by the time the unemployment rate reaches the projected 4.4%, a recession would likely already be underway.

news.headline: Employment Group in Grand Rapids restructured into three divisions - EG Talent Strategy, EG Recruitment Solutions, EG Workplace Services. - Business Wire
news.summary: A Michigan-based company, Employment Group, has revealed the reorganization of its divisions, now known as EG Talent Strategy, EG Recruitment Solutions, and EG Workplace Services to adapt to changing customer requirements. As a renowned talent strategy, acquisition, and outsourcing firm, these specialized divisions will cater to specific needs in the dynamic talent solutions sector. Formerly recognized as EG Workforce Solutions, the restructuring under CEO Ma aims to enhance services for their clients. This transformation signifies a strategic move to provide more targeted solutions tailored to individual client needs.

news.headline: 3/4 of Americans are changing cleaning habits for health; 97% say cleaning is important. -ACI Survey
news.summary: In Washington, a survey by the American Cleaning Institute (ACI) revealed that 97% of Americans consider cleaning and hygiene crucial for public and community health. The study, conducted by Wakefield Research for ACI, found that 74% of individuals had modified their cleaning routines to enhance health. Respondents agreed that cleaning positively affects their physical health (91%) and mental well-being (84%). These findings emerged during National Cleaning Week, emphasizing the significance of cleanliness in maintaining overall health.

news.headline: Redfin reports near-record housing costs with $2,793 typical monthly payment, 3.3% rise in median home-sale price.
news.summary: In Seattle, the typical monthly housing payment for the average U.S. homebuyer is currently $2,793, approaching the all-time high. This information comes from a recent report by Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN), a technology-driven real estate brokerage. The surge in housing payments is attributed to the continuous increase in sale prices and relatively high mortgage rates. Over the course of the four weeks ending on March 16, the median home-sale price saw a 3.3% year-over-year increase. Additionally, the weekly average mortgage rate stands at 6.65%, which is currently the lowest level it has been at.

news.headline: CBRE provides recast financial info for 2025 segments, revenue by business line, operating profit. Segment structure changed.
news.summary: CBRE Group, Inc. disclosed updated historical financial data on its Investor Relations website, detailing revenue and operating profit per business line, following the implementation of a revised segment structure starting from January 1, 2025. The integration of its project management division with Turner & Townsend subsidiary in early January led to the formation of a new business segment. The company, listed as NYSE: CBRE, will now report financial outcomes for a fourth business unit under the revamped structure. This move reflects CBRE's strategic realignment and pursuit of enhanced operational efficiency.

news.headline: Onx Homes named one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies of 2025 for resilient construction methods.
news.summary: A leading home builder, Onx Homes, renowned for its innovative and sustainable construction techniques backed by almost 50 patents, has earned a spot on Fast Company's esteemed compilation of the World’s Most Innovative Companies in 2025. The company's focus on creating durable and simple-to-manage homes has garnered attention. Onx Homes’ pioneering approach to disaster-resistant building practices marks a significant transformation in the realm of residential construction, presenting a scalable answer to enhance housing safety and sustainability.

news.headline: Bulat Utemuratov Foundation and Verny Capital open Kazakhstan's first community center in Kosshy, Akmola region.
news.summary: In Kosshy, Kazakhstan, on March 20, 2025, Verny Capital (Verny) and the Bulat Utemuratov Foundation launched the nation's inaugural multipurpose community center. This center, situated in the Akmola region, stands as a pioneering initiative in Kazakhstan catering to diverse community needs. The development signifies a significant investment in enhancing communal infrastructure and services.

news.headline: Crystal View Capital reports record-breaking quarter for Fund IV with 9.2% return. Q4 2024 saw 108% increase.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on March 20, 2025, Crystal View Capital shared that their Crystal View Capital Fund IV, LP ("Fund IV") had a record-breaking quarter in terms of cash flow. In the fourth quarter of 2024, Fund IV saw a remarkable 108% increase, marking a major achievement for the fund.

news.headline: CommScope and Altice Labs partner for PON Evo™ products, enhancing FTTH networks with active OLT solutions. $COMM.
news.summary: CommScope, a leading company listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol COMM, has introduced its PON Evo™ products in Claremont, NC. These products encompass a range of PON active optical line terminal (OLT) solutions.

news.headline: Oura Ring maker appoints Ricky Bloomfield, MD as CMO to lead global healthcare programs and partnerships.
news.summary: In San Francisco, ŌURA, known for its Oura Ring, a popular smart ring, has revealed the selection of Ricky Bloomfield, MD, as their new Chief Medical Officer (CMO). Dr. Bloomfield will take charge of overseeing Oura's global healthcare initiatives and partnerships, guiding the alignment with evolving healthcare standards, and encouraging collaboration among different teams to steer the development of innovative hardware and software attributes to expand the company's offerings.

news.headline: BPGbio to showcase E2-based protein degradation program at summit in Europe by Vivek Vishnudas.
news.summary: BPGbio's Chief Technology Officer Vivek Vishnudas will be discussing the company's innovative E2-based targeted protein degradation program at the upcoming TPD and Induced Proximity Summit in Boston. The presentation will focus on the advancements made by BPGbio in this area, highlighting the potential impact of their research. This event is expected to draw a large audience interested in the latest developments in targeted protein degradation, with Vishnudas playing a key role in sharing insights on their E2-based program.

news.headline: Record VC investment in Pittsburgh tech in 2024, with 182 companies securing investments, 33.8% increase from 2023. Institutional VC investment surged to $999 million, highest total on record.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, the technology ecosystem experienced a surge in venture capital (VC) deals in 2024, as reported by Ernst & Young LLP (EY US) and Innovation Works. The latest report revealed that a total of 182 companies received investments, marking a notable increase of 33.8% compared to the previous year. The institutional venture capital investment in the region hit a record high of $999 million, indicating significant growth in funding support. Notably, AI and life sciences companies were at the forefront of this trend, showcasing the evolving landscape of tech investments in Pittsburgh.

news.headline: Lantern Pharma reveals Q4 & FY 2024 operating & financial results on March 27, 2025 at 4:30 PM ET.
A+E Global Media renews partnership with FreeWheel to advance advertising evolution; expands genres across platforms.
news.summary: A global entertainment company, A+E Global Media™, has renewed its long-term partnership with FreeWheel, a global technology platform for the multi-media advertising industry. This partnership will continue to offer premium programming across various genres on linear and multiplatform ecosystems. A+E Global Media™ specializes in historical documentaries, biographies, pop culture, paranormal, crime and justice, movies, features, lifestyle programming, and more. This collaboration will help in powering the future of entertainment with cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: AArete in Chicago strengthens leadership team with 1 Senior Managing Director, 3 Managing Director promotions, and strategic hire as part of growth plans.
news.summary: In Chicago, a global management and technology consulting firm called AArete has made multiple leadership appointments to support its ongoing expansion. The firm has appointed new leaders who will steer its growth in the business consulting sector.

news.headline: GE HealthCare launches Invenia ABUS Premium to enhance early cancer detection in dense breasts; 71% of cancers occur in dense breasts.
news.summary: In Chicago, GE HealthCare (Nasdaq: GEHC) has introduced Invenia™ Automated Breast Ultrasound (ABUS) Premium, the newest 3D ultrasound technology that incorporates advanced artificial intelligence (AI) and innovative features for quicker and more consistent supplemental screening. This technology aims to streamline examination readings for patients with dense breasts, as around 71% of breast cancer cases are found in such cases. Recent studies have indicated that 40% of women in the U.S. and Europe, as well as 70% of Asian women, have dense breasts.

news.headline: Hoteliers may see a 12% rise in room rates by highlighting best features or services, as per Amadeus study of 6,000 travelers.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by Amadeus, a technology company, delves into travelers' desires and the role of technology in fulfilling them. Titled "Travel Dreams," the report is based on feedback from 6,000 travelers across the US, China, India, UK, France, and Germany. It aims to uncover preferences in destination selection, booking methods, and trip experiences. The research reveals that 63% of hotel guests are willing to pay extra for certain amenities or services during their stay. This study sheds light on the evolving landscape of travel and the increasing reliance on technology to enhance the overall travel experience.

news.headline: Cognitiv expands collaboration with OpenAI due to high demand for ContextGPT; began in March 2023. Leading adtech company delivering advanced contextual advertising.
news.summary: In New York today, Cognitiv, a prominent advanced performance partner utilizing deep learning technology, revealed an extension of their ongoing partnership with OpenAI, which commenced in March 2023. Cognitiv stands out as one of the initial adtech firms to engage in a substantial partnership with OpenAI and was among the first to utilize its APIs. By leveraging OpenAI's models, Cognitiv aims to provide brands and agencies with innovative contextual advertising solutions that prioritize privacy.

news.headline: Amount connects with Q2's Digital Banking Platform through Partner Accelerator Program, aiding financial institutions.
news.summary: In Chicago, Amount, a prominent provider of deposit and loan origination software for consumers and small businesses, revealed an integration with Q2's Digital Banking Platform through the Q2 Partner Accelerator Program. Q2 Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: QTWO), a top digital transformation solutions provider for banking and lending, facilitates this collaboration. Under the Q2 Partner Accelerator Program, financial institutions have the opportunity to acquire Amount's services enabling them to provide credit card accounts for both consumers and small businesses.

news.headline: Silicon Data raises $4.7M in seed funding led by DRW and Jump Trading Group; focuses on enhancing compute market intelligence.
news.summary: Silicon Data, a prominent figure in enhancing data transparency and efficiency in the compute sector, has revealed the completion of a successful $4.7 million seed funding round. This funding was co-led by DRW and Jump Trading Group, alongside other strategic investors. The aim of this funding round is to propel Silicon Data's objective of improving compute market intelligence, sustainability, and performance benchmarking in what is becoming a critical asset class in both data and financial services.

news.headline: 91% of manufacturers in survey by Aras plan to increase investments in AI for product development.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Aras in Andover, Massachusetts, revealed that 91% of manufacturers are intending to boost their investments in artificial intelligence (AI) for product development. This news was shared through a press release on Business Wire under the headline "Digital Thread."

news.headline: Mercans and Deloitte collaborate to create top-tier Quality and Risk Management Framework.
news.summary: Mercans has recently announced a strategic collaboration with Deloitte to establish an industry-leading quality and risk management framework. The partnership aims to enhance operational efficiency and mitigate risks by leveraging Deloitte's expertise in this domain. This alliance is projected to bolster Mercans' operational standards and overall performance, ensuring adherence to the highest quality benchmarks. The collaborative effort will bring together the strengths of Mercans, a prominent global player in HR, payroll, and compliance solutions, and Deloitte, renowned for its excellence in risk management and advisory services. By joining forces, the two companies aspire to elevate their services to a new level of excellence. This partnership underscores Mercans' commitment to delivering top-tier solutions and maintaining the highest standards of quality and compliance. The collaboration with Deloitte is poised to revolutionize Mercans' operations, setting a new standard for quality and risk management in the industry. This venture represents a significant step forward for Mercans, paving the way for enhanced service delivery and client satisfaction. With Deloitte's support, Mercans is well-positioned to optimize its operations and excel in the increasingly competitive market landscape.

news.headline: intelliflo redblack named Best Financial Advisory Platform by FinTech Breakthrough in Atlanta.
news.summary: A fintech company, Intelliflo Redblack, has been awarded the title of Best Financial Advisory Platform by Fintech Breakthrough. This recognition highlights the platform's excellence in the financial advisory sector.

news.headline: Community college students find value in pairing academic degrees with industry certifications for better job prospects - CompTIA research goes in depth.
news.summary: In Downers Grove, Illinois, on March 20, 2025, community college students are seeing the value of digital fluency and industry-recognized certifications as key factors in securing job opportunities. The students believe that pairing an academic degree with a certification can broaden their employment prospects. This emphasizes the importance of obtaining industry-recognized credentials to stand out in the competitive job market. The trend indicates a shift towards a focus on practical skills and certifications alongside traditional academic qualifications, reflecting the changing demands of the job market.

news.headline: General Catalyst invests $46M in Campus, a 2-year college for Gen Z. Ken Chenault, Joe Lonsdale, Shaquille O'Neal among backers.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in New York, Ken Chenault has teamed up with Joe Lonsdale, Jason Citron, Shaquille O'Neal, and several others to support Campus in its mission to fast-track the development of future talents. Campus, a unique two-year college designed for the modern learner dissatisfied with the expense and duration of traditional higher education, is gaining momentum with this influential backing. This partnership brings significant resources and expertise to Campus, aiming to revolutionize education for the next generation.

news.headline: SSAB releases its Annual Report 2024 in Stockholm on March 20, 2025, detailing the company's progress and CEO's review.
news.summary: A new Annual Report for the year 2024 has been released by SSAB in Stockholm on March 20, 2025. This report includes a detailed overview of SSAB's performance throughout the year, with insights into the business segments' progress. It features the CEO's review and other key information. The report offers a comprehensive look at the company's achievements and challenges in 2024. For more details, interested parties can access the full report.

news.headline: Powell labels inflation as 'transitory', sparking optimism among investors as economists express concerns about repeating history.
news.summary: The Federal Reserve chair's evaluation was well received by investors, leading to positive market reactions. However, certain economists express concerns about the potential for a repetition of past events.

news.headline: Richtech Robotics and Ghost Kitchens open restaurant at Peachtree City Walmart, 3rd One Kitchen location with AI Scorpion robot.
news.summary: The opening of the third One Kitchen supercenter in Georgia is a significant milestone in the collaboration. This location is the first to showcase the Company's cutting-edge AI-driven Scorpion robot. The implementation of this high-tech robotic technology marks a step forward in enhancing efficiency and innovation within the supercenter.

news.headline: NeurAxis sees 43% revenue increase in Q4 2024; conference call today at 9:00 am ET.
news.summary: A conference call is scheduled for today, Thursday, March 20, at 9:00 am Eastern Time (ET). The call will take place at 9:00 am ET on Thursday, March 20.
